x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of creating and approving a loan facility for a customer.

Comment:
Examples:
Personal loan
Mortgage loan
Auto loan
Business loan

Example Scenario:
A bank originates a €50,000 home loan for a customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Account Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of opening a deposit account for a customer to store funds.

Comment:
Examples:
Savings account
Current account
Checking account

Example Scenario:
A customer opens a new savings account at the bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Term Deposit Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The creation of a fixed-term deposit product where funds are deposited for a specific period with interest.

Comment:
Examples:
Fixed deposit
Certificate of deposit (CD)

Example Scenario:
A customer deposits €10,000 for 12 months in a term deposit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Card Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of issuing a credit card facility to a customer with a defined credit limit.

Comment:
Examples:
Standard credit card
Gold credit card
Corporate credit card

Example Scenario:
A bank issues a credit card with a €5,000 limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Facility Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The creation of an overdraft limit that allows customers to withdraw more money than their account balance.

Comment:
Examples:
Personal overdraft
Business overdraft

Example Scenario:
A bank grants a €2,000 overdraft limit on a current account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The process of initiating an investment product for a customer.

Comment:
Examples:
Mutual fund account
Investment portfolio
Retirement savings plan

Example Scenario:
A customer opens a mutual fund investment account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Service Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The activation of payment-related banking services for a customer.

Comment:
Examples:
Debit card issuance
Online banking access
Mobile banking service

Example Scenario:
A bank activates mobile banking for a new account holder.
